title: oncocarpus macrophylla
intro: Oncocarpus macrophylla, also known as the 'large-leaved Oncocarpus', is a plant species in the family Gentianaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Oncocarpus macrophylla include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating digestive problems. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties.
